headline: Leidos Cloud And AI Cyber Deals Reframe Valuation And Momentum Story
summary: Leidos Holdings (NYSE:LDOS) won a major contract to modernize the U.S. Air Force's Cloud One platform. The company is also partnering with Dropzone AI to speed up adoption of AI powered cybersecurity across federal agencies. These developments highlight Leidos' role in federal IT modernization, cloud security, and AI driven cyber defense. Leidos Holdings, trading at around $173.37, sits at an interesting point for investors who follow government technology and services. The stock is up...
